title: A Wonderful Summer Mountain Vacation
passage:
Last summer I went on vacation with my parents. We drove to a holiday resort(度假村). After getting there, we climbed the mountains first. It was a little cold in the mountains. But we were lucky because we took our coats with us. It didn't take us long to get to the top of the mountain. And on the way to the mountain, we also saw many beautiful flowers. We walked around the mountain and saw some animals in the forest.

After getting back to the resort, we relaxed in the hot spring water(温泉). It made me feel happy. Dishes in the resort were quite delicious. We enjoyed a big dinner. At about 8:00 p.m., we had a party around a campfire(篝火). We danced and sang with other visitors. We also played games together. It was great fun.

questions.prompt: When did the writer go on vacation?
How did they go to the holiday resort?
What did they see on the way to the mountain?
What do you think of the vacation? Why? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: I think the writer had a highly enjoyable and memorable summer vacation.
Because they could climb mountains, see wild animals, relax in hot springs, and enjoy a campfire party.
It was a wonderful blend of active outdoor adventures and relaxing family time.
I think the trip to the mountains was extremely tiring and boring.
Because it rained all day and we couldn't go out to play.
To sum up, staying at home is much better than travelling in bad weather.
